name: ken-burns
title: KenBurns
description: Slow zoom-and-pan over a photo — the iconic documentary motion (named after Ken Burns, the filmmaker). Restrained 1.0 → 1.1 scale over 5 seconds by default; intentionally linear for a constant cinematic drift. The first Onda cinematic primitive.
pickWhen: a held photo needs to feel alive — documentary, archive, portrait. Use `parallax` for drift only; `image-reveal` for one-shot.
